title: Odontosoria intermedia

intro: Odontosoria intermedia is a species of fern, specifically a type of climbing or scrambling fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and pain, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which are beneficial for reducing swelling and relieving discomfort.
